business.name: Alpine Painting Co
business.tagline: Elevating Denver homes, one brushstroke at a time

hero.headline: Denver's Premier Painting — *Beautiful Finishes Guaranteed*
hero.subheadline: Transform your home with our professional crew's expertise. Free estimates, 10-year warranty, and flawless results that last.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Painting Solutions
services_section.subheading: From interior transformations to exterior protection, we handle every detail with precision and care.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Complete room makeovers with premium paints, precise cut lines, and thorough prep work. We protect your furniture and leave your space spotless.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Weather-resistant coatings that protect and beautify your home's exterior. Includes power washing, scraping, and primer application.

services.title: Deck Staining & Sealing
services.description: Restore and protect your deck with professional staining services. We sand, clean, and apply premium stains that withstand Colorado weather.

services.title: Custom Finishes
services.description: Specialty techniques including faux finishes, textured walls, and decorative painting to create unique, personalized spaces.

about.heading: Trusted Throughout the Denver Metro Area
about.body: Alpine Painting Co has been transforming Denver homes for over a decade. Our skilled team combines traditional craftsmanship with modern techniques, ensuring every project exceeds expectations. We use only premium materials and stand behind our work with a comprehensive 10-year warranty.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Alpine painted our entire first floor in just 3 days. The crew was incredibly professional, cleaned up perfectly each day, and the finish quality is amazing. Six months later and it still looks perfect.

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Had them stain our deck last spring before a big party. They worked around our timeline, the color match was exactly what we wanted, and it's held up beautifully through the harsh winter.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: The custom faux finish in our dining room turned out incredible. They took time to show us samples and really listened to our vision. Worth every penny for the artistic quality.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Exterior painting job was completed ahead of schedule despite some weather delays. Great communication throughout and the house looks brand new. Highly recommend Alpine.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Denver & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting services throughout the Denver metro region.

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.body: Get your free, detailed estimate today. Our experienced team is ready to bring your vision to life with guaranteed beautiful results.
